info.description: Backend API for the emergency rescue planner
info.title: Emergency Rescue Planner API

post.description: Routes the chat request to OpenAI or Anthropic based on model prefix and returns the full response.
post.summary: Send a one-shot chat request to an AI provider

post.description: Routes the streaming chat request to OpenAI or Anthropic and forwards each delta as an SSE data frame.

get.description: Returns the prioritised checklist of rescue items and reasons for the given disaster_type and disability_type.
get.summary: Get rescue checklist for a (disaster, disability) pair

parameters.description: Disability type — one of the 15 canonical NDIS-style labels (e.g. Hearing Impairment, Autism, Other Sensory/Speech); case-sensitive, exact match
parameters.name: disability_type

get.description: Returns seeded Melbourne risk zones filtered by haversine distance from (lat, lng).
get.summary: List risk zones near a coordinate

get.description: Proxies to Nominatim and returns a human-readable address label.
get.summary: Reverse geocode coordinates to a label

get.description: Proxies to Nominatim and returns normalised lat/lng/label results.
Returns the full article including content (intro + sections). Returns 404 when id is not found.
Returns the hardcoded list of BCP-47 language codes and their English display names that are accepted by POST /api/knowledge/translate.
Returns a paginated list of article summaries plus aggregated facets derived from the full filtered set.
get.summary: List knowledge articles by keyword and filters

post.description: Accepts a multipart/form-data upload with an "audio" file field and optional "model"/"language" fields. Returns transcribed text and the BCP-47 detected language code.
post.summary: Transcribe audio to text via Whisper

parameters.description: Audio file (mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm)
parameters.name: audio

post.description: Sends the input text to a Claude model with a translation system prompt and returns the translated text.
Sends the input text to OpenAI's /audio/speech endpoint and streams the audio back as audio/mpeg.
post.summary: Convert text to speech via OpenAI TTS

post.description: Accepts an audio file, transcribes it via Whisper, extracts a structured search intent via Claude, and returns the transcript, intent, and matching articles in one response.

parameters.description: Audio file (mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm)
parameters.name: audio

post.description: Returns all official and OSM facility point locations within the given bounding box
post.summary: Get facilities within a bounding box

post.description: Returns aggregated geographic, demographic, facility, risk and historical disaster data for all areas within the given bounding box
Returns a road-network route with turn-by-turn steps. Requires ORS_API_KEY.

get.description: Returns seeded Melbourne vulnerable persons filtered by haversine distance from (lat, lng).
get.summary: List vulnerable persons near a coordinate

get.description: Returns service status, dependency state, uptime, and registered routes.

checklist_engine.ChecklistResponse.description: Prioritised rescue checklist for a (disaster, disability) pair.

items.description: Server-ordered checklist items (see SQL ORDER BY in get_checklist.sql)

database.ChecklistRow.description: One prioritised rescue-checklist item for a (disaster, disability) pair.

item_name.description: Human-readable rescue checklist item (e.g. "Strobe-light smoke alarm")

reason.description: Curator-authored explanation of why this item matters for the (disaster, disability) pair
reason.example: Audible alarms cannot be relied upon.

database.FacilityRow.description: A facility point with source, category, name and GeoJSON geometry.

name.description: Facility name, may be null for some OSM entries

info_engine.FacilitiesRequest.description: Bounding box parameters for querying facilities within a geographic area.

bbox_xmax.description: Maximum longitude of the bounding box (east boundary)

bbox_xmin.description: Minimum longitude of the bounding box (west boundary)

bbox_ymax.description: Maximum latitude of the bounding box (north boundary)

bbox_ymin.description: Minimum latitude of the bounding box (south boundary)

info_engine.GeoAreaResponse.description: GetGeoAreas response: all GeoAreaRow fields plus per-group vulnerability statistics.

area_code.description: Area code corresponding to the aggregation level (e.g. SA2 code)

area_name.description: Human-readable area name; sa2 name when agg_level is sa1

autism_pct.description: Proportion of autistic residents among total disability population (%)

autism_support_needs.description: Aggregated support needs for the autism group

cognitive_count.description: Estimated count of cognitively impaired residents

cognitive_pct.description: Proportion of cognitively impaired residents among total disability population (%)

cognitive_support_needs.description: Aggregated support needs for the cognitive group

disease_breakdown.description: JSON array of disease breakdown records with needs mapping

geometry.description: Area polygon geometry in GeoJSON format

hearing_pct.description: Proportion of hearing-impaired residents among total disability population (%)

hearing_support_needs.description: Aggregated support needs for the hearing group

historical_eq_count.description: Historical earthquake event count within the seasonal window

historical_fire_count.description: Historical bushfire event count within the seasonal window

historical_flood_count.description: Historical flood event count within the year window

mobility_pct.description: Proportion of mobility-impaired residents among total disability population (%)

mobility_support_needs.description: Aggregated support needs for the mobility group

other_official.description: Number of other official emergency facilities

shelter.description: Number of open-space shelters (OSM, category = open_space)

tot_disability.description: Total population with disability (G18 census, age group Tot)

total_facilities.description: Combined count of official and OSM facilities

info_engine.GeoRequest.description: Query parameters for drilling into a specific parent region at a given aggregation level.

parent_code.description: Parent area code (numeric SA code). Empty when agg_level is "state".

parent_level.description: Parent aggregation level. Empty when agg_level is "state". Must be strictly higher than agg_level.

target_date.description: Target date for historical disaster look back in YYYY-MM-DD format

knowledge_engine.Article.description: Full article including content; returned only by GetByID.

external_url.description: External URL to the original source article, if any

summary.description: One-line summary shown in list views
summary.example: Plan your evacuation route before fire season.

title.example: Bushfire prep for residents with mobility limitations

external_url.description: External URL to the original source article, if any

summary.description: One-line summary shown in list views
summary.example: Plan your evacuation route before fire season.

title.example: Bushfire prep for residents with mobility limitations

knowledge_engine.Content.description: Full article body: a short intro plus an ordered list of sections.

intro.description: Short lead paragraph shown above sections

knowledge_engine.ContentBlock.description: Single section inside an article body.

body.example: Pack medication, ID copies, and a torch.

knowledge_engine.Facets.description: Facet values aggregated from the full filtered set, not the page.

disability_types.description: Sorted, deduplicated union of disability_types across the filtered set

hazards.description: Sorted, deduplicated union of hazards across the filtered set

knowledge_engine.SearchResponse.description: Paginated knowledge search response with inline facets.

facets.description: Facet values derived from the full filtered set

limit.description: Echo of the page size used to produce Data

offset.description: Echo of the page offset used to produce Data

total.description: Total count of matched articles (before pagination)

translation_engine.LanguageOption.description: BCP-47 language code and its English display name.

code.description: BCP-47 language code passed as target_language to POST /api/knowledge/translate

name.description: English display name shown in the language-selection UI

translation_engine.TTSRequest.description: TTS input: text to speak, voice selection, and optional model / speed overrides.

speed.description: Speech speed multiplier (0.25–4.0); 0 uses the provider default (1.0)

text.example: Residents in the flood zone must evacuate before 6 pm.

voice.description: Voice ID to use; defaults to alloy

translation_engine.TranscribeResponse.description: Transcription result including the BCP-47 detected language code.

detected_language.description: BCP-47 language code detected by Whisper (e.g. en, zh, fr)

text.description: Full transcribed text from the audio file
text.example: Residents in the flood zone must evacuate before 6 pm.

translation_engine.TranslateRequest.description: Translation input: source text, BCP-47 target language, and optional model override.

model.description: Claude model to use; defaults to claude-haiku-4-5

text.example: Residents in the flood zone must evacuate before 6 pm.

detected_source_language.description: BCP-47 source language code detected during translation (reserved; not populated)

translated_text.description: Translated text in the requested target language
translated_text.example: 洪水区居民必须在下午6点前撤离。

disability_types.description: Disability-type filters extracted from the transcript

hazards.description: Hazard filters extracted from the transcript

phase.description: Disaster phase filter; one of "pre", "during", "post", or "" if not detected

q.description: Free-text keyword passed to the knowledge search

voice_search_engine.VoiceSearchResponse.description: Voice search result combining the raw transcript, the extracted intent, and matching articles.

intent.description: Structured intent extracted by Claude; falls back to {q: transcript} when extraction fails

results.description: Knowledge search results matching the extracted intent

transcript.description: Raw text transcribed from the audio
